title.pt: Servidor HTTP com o módulo http
title.en: HTTP server with the http module
title.es: Servidor HTTP con el módulo http
title.it: Server HTTP con il modulo http
title.fr: Serveur HTTP avec le module http

tests: const server = createServer(); await new Promise((r) => server.listen(3001, r)); const res = await fetch('http://localhost:3001/'); const text = await res.text(); await new Promise((r) => server.close(r)); expect(text).toBe('Hello, Node!');

const server2 = createServer(); await new Promise((r) => server2.listen(3002, r)); const res2 = await fetch('http://localhost:3002/any/path'); const text2 = await res2.text(); await new Promise((r) => server2.close(r)); expect(text2).toBe('Hello, Node!');
